creator: shitman71@hotmail.com
text:
To give you some more detail, it happens after downloading the file via internet or receiving it via cache. Exavtly at the point running it.

The attachment shows an attempt to run dotnet3.0 installer via winetricks from beginning, its getting stuck with an window opened and saying "running..." but nothing happens. Winetricks aborts and i have to manually start winetricks again.
